ResourceRequired.description: Amount of resource j required for experiment i

ElectricityProduced.description: Amount of electricity produced by experiment i

assumptions.description: The electricity produced by each experiment must be non-negative.

code.python: assert all(ElectricityProduced[i] >= 0 for i in range(NumExperiments))

assumptions.description: The resource required by each experiment must be non-negative.

code.python: assert all(ResourceRequired[j][i] >= 0 for j in range(NumResources) for i in range(NumExperiments))

assumptions.description: The amount of each resource available must be non-negative.

code.python: assert all(ResourceAvailable[j] >= 0 for j in range(NumResources))

assumptions.description: The number of resource types must be positive.
The number of experiment types must be positive.

ConductExperiment.description: The number of times each experiment is conducted

constraints.description: For each resource, the total amount required across all experiments does not exceed the available amount.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(quicksum(ResourceRequired[j][i] * ConductExperiment[i] for i in range(NumExperiments)) <= ResourceAvailable[j] for j in range(NumResources))

constraints.description: The number of times each experiment is conducted must be non-negative.

objective.description: Maximize the total electricity produced by conducting the experiments.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum(ConductExperiment[i] * ElectricityProduced[i] for i in range(NumExperiments)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
